---
title: "AFLIBER news"
---


#### ??/2026 AFLIBER update is on the way...

#### 02/2026 Error reporting
You can report errors using an implemented form directly form the [Shynyapp viewer](https://afliber.shinyapps.io/afliber).


#### 02/2025 AFLIBER shinyapp has new features
Maps are now interactive, and geographic lookup is implemented.
Learn more [here](https://afliber.shinyapps.io/afliber).


#### 01/2022 AFLIBER shinyapp is now available!!
Learn [here](https://afliber.shinyapps.io/afliber) how to use it



#### 07/2021 AFLIBER gets published at Global Ecology and Biogeography

Check [here](https://doi.org/10.1111/geb.13363) for more info!
